raw:
# LinkedIn Radar — 2026-06-01

## Signals
- A competitor publicly deprecated their free tier. (linkedin)
- Our open-source SDK crossed 2k stars. (repos)
- Industry chatter about AI procurement budgets tightening. (news)

## Post angles
1. "Why we kept our free tier" — react to the competitor's move with our reasoning.
2. "2,000 stars and what we learned" — a builder retrospective on the SDK.
3. "How to buy AI tools in a tight budget year" — a practical buyer's checklist.

## Themes
- Trust and transparency as a wedge against bigger incumbents.

## Problems
- The news signal is unverified — treat the budget claim as a hypothesis, not fact.

```json
{
  "date": "2026-06-01",
  "signals": [
    { "signal": "Competitor deprecated their free tier", "source": "linkedin" },
    { "signal": "Open-source SDK crossed 2k stars", "source": "repos" },
    { "signal": "Chatter about AI procurement budgets tightening", "source": "news" }
  ],
  "post_angles": [
    { "angle": "Why we kept our free tier", "hook": "React to the competitor's deprecation with our reasoning" },
    { "angle": "2,000 stars and what we learned", "hook": "A builder retrospective on the SDK" },
    { "angle": "How to buy AI tools in a tight budget year", "hook": "A practical buyer's checklist" }
  ],
  "themes": ["Trust and transparency as a wedge against incumbents"],
  "problems": ["News signal unverified — budget claim is a hypothesis, not fact"]
}
```
